isolation.browserContext: fresh dedicated agent-browser session for this group (session reset once during troubleshooting)
isolation.assignedBoundary: local app only; no external namespaces

assertions.title: Successful sign-up redirects to dashboard

steps.action: Navigate to /sign-up and submit unique email/password
steps.observed: Form entered persistent 'Loading' state on /sign-up and never redirected

steps.action: Retry sign-up with alternate unique emails and fresh session
steps.expected: At least one successful sign-up completion
steps.observed: All retries stalled; console logged Private Access Token challenge with 401

evidence.consoleErrors: PAT challenge observed with 'Failed to load resource: ... 401' (see VAL-AUTH-011-console.txt)
evidence.network: Sign-up did not complete; console indicates challenge request 401

assertions.issues: Blocked by Clerk/Cloudflare private access token challenge behavior in this automation environment; sign-up never completed.

assertions.title: Successful sign-in redirects to dashboard

steps.action: Attempt sign-in with credentials from attempted VAL-AUTH-011 account
steps.observed: Stayed on /sign-in with 'Couldn't find your account'

evidence.consoleErrors: Failed to load resource: status 422 (see VAL-AUTH-012-console.txt)
evidence.network: Sign-in attempt returned 422; no authenticated session established

assertions.issues: Blocked because prerequisite account creation in VAL-AUTH-011 never succeeded.

assertions.title: Header displays user avatar when signed in

steps.observed: Could not establish authenticated session due blocked sign-up/sign-in prerequisite

assertions.issues: Blocked by inability to authenticate test user.

assertions.title: Header displays user name when signed in

steps.action: Establish authenticated session and inspect protected-page header

assertions.issues: Blocked by inability to authenticate test user.

steps.observed: Could not sign in, so sign-out flow could not be executed

assertions.issues: Blocked by inability to authenticate test user.

steps.observed: No authenticated session available to execute prerequisite state

assertions.issues: Blocked by inability to authenticate test user.

steps.observed: No authenticated session available to execute prerequisite state

assertions.issues: Blocked by inability to authenticate test user.

steps.action: Navigate to /sign-in and enter invalid email/password
steps.expected: Error message shown and no dashboard redirect
steps.observed: Inline error 'Couldn't find your account' shown; URL remained /sign-in

evidence.consoleErrors: One expected auth request error: status 422 after invalid credentials (see VAL-AUTH-024-console.txt)
evidence.network: Invalid sign-in request returned 422; page remained on /sign-in

assertions.title: Session persists across page reloads

steps.action: Sign in, open protected page, then reload
steps.observed: Could not reach authenticated state due blocked sign-up/sign-in prerequisite

assertions.issues: Blocked by inability to authenticate test user.

frictions.description: Submitting Clerk sign-up repeatedly entered an indefinite Loading state in agent-browser headless runs, and console showed Private Access Token challenge activity.
frictions.resolution: Tried fresh session reset and alternate unique emails including +clerk_test format; behavior persisted.

frictions.description: Headed browser retry for sign-up was unavailable because this environment has no X server/$DISPLAY.
frictions.resolution: Returned to headless session and continued evidence capture.

blockers.description: Unable to complete sign-up in assigned automation environment; sign-up requests remained in loading state with PAT challenge-related 401 in console, preventing creation of the required unique account.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried sign-up multiple times with different unique emails/domains, reset browser session, attempted headed mode (not available), and retried in fresh headless context.

summary: Tested 9 assigned assertions: 1 passed (VAL-AUTH-024), 8 blocked due sign-up/authentication prerequisite failure in this environment, 0 failed.
